channel.title: Spearfish Bulletin — Events
channel.description: Upcoming local events aggregated by Spearfish Bulletin

item.title: Community Egg Hunt
item.description:
Date: Wed, 11 Mar 2026 12:37:05 -0600
Event date: April 4, 2026
Event Time: 10:00 AM - 10:30 AM
Location:
115 S Canyon St
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
Bring your family and neighbors for a morning of fun and springtime tradition!
Join us at 10 a.m. Saturday, April 4, at Spearfish City Park (the hunt begins promptly at 10 a.m., so plan to arrive early!).
Source

item.title: Teen Game Day
item.description:
Date: Wed, 04 Mar 2026 12:00:02 -0600
Event date: March 31, 2026
Event Time: 03:30 PM - 05:00 PM
Location:
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
Join us for some gaming fun! We will have a variety of board and card games, multiplayer chess, and even some TTRPGs available...and snacks! Open to grades 6-12.
Source

item.title: Teen Game Day
item.description:
Date: Wed, 04 Mar 2026 12:00:02 -0600
Event date: April 7, 2026
Event Time: 03:30 PM - 05:00 PM
Location:
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
Join us for some gaming fun! We will have a variety of board and card games, multiplayer chess, and even some TTRPGs available...and snacks! Open to grades 6-12.
Source

item.title: Teen Game Day
item.description:
Date: Wed, 04 Mar 2026 12:00:02 -0600
Event date: April 14, 2026
Event Time: 03:30 PM - 05:00 PM
Location:
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
Join us for some gaming fun! We will have a variety of board and card games, multiplayer chess, and even some TTRPGs available...and snacks! Open to grades 6-12.
Source

item.title: City of Spearfish - Weather & Roads
item.description:
Date: Tue, 10 Mar 2026 16:52:39 -0600
Staff are monitoring weather and road conditions. If warranted, snow removal crews will be dispatched as early as 4:00 AM Wednesday. Operations will focus on Priority 1 and Priority 2 routes to ensure main travel corridors are cleared.
Source

item.title: Planning Commission Meeting
item.description:
Date: Tue, 10 Mar 2026 13:01:01 -0600
Event date: April 7, 2026
Event Time: 05:00 PM - 05:59 PM
Location:
City Hall
625 N 5th St
Spearfish, SD 57783
Source

item.title: Spring Clean-Up April 17-18 at Restricted Use Site
item.description:
Date: Tue, 10 Mar 2026 11:48:00 -0600
The Spearfish Restricted Use Site (RUS), located at 910 Camp Comfort Road, will be waiving fees for residents of the City of Spearfish and Lawrence County on Friday, April 17th through Saturday, April 18th. The RUS will be open from 7:30 AM to 4 PM.
Source

item.title: Library CLOSED For Easter
item.description:
Date: Tue, 06 Jan 2026 13:39:56 -0600
Event date: April 5, 2026
Event Time: 12:00 AM - 11:59 PM
Location:
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
The library will be CLOSED for Easter.
Source

item.title: Fiber Arts Group
item.description:
Date: Thu, 26 Feb 2026 10:13:29 -0600
Event date: April 2, 2026
Event Time: 05:00 PM - 06:30 PM
Location:
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
Join fellow hobbyists for social time while you knit, crochet, stitch, etc. All ages welcome, but children should be accompanied by an adult. No instruction will be provided. Bring your own project.
Source

item.title: Snow Removal Subscription Service
item.description:
Date: Sun, 22 Mar 2026 12:43:00 -0600
The City is pleased to announce a snow removal subscription service designed to assist residents with the removal of snow windrows left in front of driveways following plowing operations.
Source

item.title: Pavement Condition Data Collection Begins March 30, 2026
item.description:
Date: Mon, 30 Mar 2026 15:06:03 -0600
March 30, 2026, Infrastructure Management Services (IMS) will begin collecting data on City roads. A vehicle pulling a small trailer will be slowly travelling up and down City streets mostly between 6 p.m. and 6 a.m. testing the pavement condition.
Source

item.title: Friends of the Library Book Sale
item.description:
Date: Mon, 15 Dec 2025 16:02:38 -0600
Event dates: April 9, 2026 - April 12, 2026
Event Time: 12:00 AM - 11:59 PM
Location:
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
Purchase a bag of books and media for $5 and help support library programming.
Source

item.title: Autumn Trio musical performance
item.description:
Date: Mon, 15 Dec 2025 13:55:24 -0600
Event date: April 1, 2026
Event Time: 05:30 PM - 06:30 PM
Location:
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
The Autumn Trio will perform their popular arrangements of folk and classical music. The trio features Katrina Garnett on flute, Chris Davis on guitar, and Rodney Garnett on alto flute and 19th century flute
Source

item.title: City Council Study Session
item.description:
Date: Mon, 15 Dec 2025 13:52:18 -0600
Event date: April 1, 2026
Event Time: 05:15 PM - 06:15 PM
Location:
City Hall
625 N 5th St
Spearfish, SD 57783
Source

item.title: Chess Club
item.description:
Date: Mon, 15 Dec 2025 13:10:08 -0600
Event date: April 13, 2026
Event Time: 05:00 PM - 06:30 PM
Location:
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
Come learn and play chess with others who enjoy the game. No experience necessary. Open to all ages.
Source

item.title: Lego Club (Ages 5-7)
item.description:
Date: Mon, 15 Dec 2025 13:03:46 -0600
Event date: April 1, 2026
Event Time: 03:30 PM - 04:30 PM
Location:
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
Join us for a once monthly Lego Club. Imagine. Build. Display! Show off your designs and creations. This program is designed for AGES 5-7.

Please do not bring your own Legos.
Source

item.title: Lego Club (Ages 8+)
item.description:
Date: Mon, 15 Dec 2025 13:02:36 -0600
Event date: April 15, 2026
Event Time: 03:30 PM - 04:30 PM
Location:
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
Join us for a once monthly Lego Club. Imagine. Build. Display! Show off your designs and creations. This program is designed for AGES 8+.

Please do not bring your own Legos.
Source

item.title: Annual cleanup day at Rose Hill Cemetery
item.description:
Date: Mon, 09 Mar 2026 15:24:21 -0600
Event date: April 1, 2026
Event Time: 12:00 AM - 11:59 PM
Location:
255 Ash St
Spearfish, SD 57783
Description:
The annual cleanup day at Rose Hill Cemetery is Wednesday, April 1, when cemetery staff will be picking up decorations around the monuments in preparation for the summer. They will collect items that are protruding past the foundation of the monuments, in the ground surrounding the monuments, or items that have become unsightly.
Source

item.title: Annual cleanup day April 1 at Rose Hill Cemetery
item.description:
Date: Mon, 09 Mar 2026 15:11:00 -0600
The annual cleanup day at Rose Hill Cemetery is Wednesday, April 1, when cemetery staff will be picking up decorations around the monuments in preparation for the summer.
Source

item.title: City of Spearfish - Snow Removal Subscription Service
item.description:
Date: Fri, 13 Mar 2026 16:48:32 -0600
Applications for the Snow Removal Subscription Service are now available. Stop by City Hall or call Public Works at 605-642-1333 to learn more about the program and get an application.
Source
